get_password: SELECT password from users WHERE user_id = %s
get_user: SELECT u.group_uuid, u.user_uuid, u.user_id, u.user_name FROM users u WHERE u.user_id = %s
get_user_accounts: SELECT * FROM mail_accounts WHERE user_uuid = %s AND status = 'active' ORDER BY display_order
insert_account: INSERT INTO mail_accounts (user_uuid, account_name, email, imap_host, imap_port, imap_username, imap_password_encrypted, smtp_host, smtp_port, smtp_username, smtp_password_encrypted) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)
get_account_folders: SELECT * FROM mail_folders WHERE account_uuid = %s ORDER BY display_order, folder_name
insert_folder: INSERT INTO mail_folders (account_uuid, folder_name, folder_path, folder_type) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s)
get_messages: SELECT * FROM mail_messages WHERE account_uuid = %s AND folder_uuid = %s AND is_deleted = FALSE ORDER BY sent_date DESC LIMIT %s OFFSET %s
insert_message: INSERT INTO mail_messages (account_uuid, folder_uuid, message_id, uid, from_email, from_name, to_emails, subject, preview, sent_date, body_text, body_html, size_bytes, has_attachments) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)
update_message_read: UPDATE mail_messages SET is_read = %s, modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE message_uuid = %s AND account_uuid IN (SELECT account_uuid FROM mail_accounts WHERE user_uuid = %s)
update_message_pinned: UPDATE mail_messages SET is_pinned = %s, modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE message_uuid = %s AND account_uuid IN (SELECT account_uuid FROM mail_accounts WHERE user_uuid = %s)
count_unread_for_user: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM mail_messages WHERE is_read = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 AND account_uuid IN (SELECT account_uuid FROM mail_accounts WHERE user_uuid = %s)
mark_all_read_for_user: UPDATE mail_messages SET is_read = 1, modified_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE is_read = 0 AND is_deleted = 0 AND account_uuid IN (SELECT account_uuid FROM mail_accounts WHERE user_uuid = %s)
get_user_labels: SELECT * FROM mail_labels WHERE user_uuid = %s ORDER BY display_order
get_message_labels: SELECT l.* FROM mail_labels l JOIN mail_message_labels ml ON l.label_uuid = ml.label_uuid WHERE ml.message_uuid = %s

accounts.get_accounts: SELECT account_uuid, account_name, email, imap_host, imap_port, smtp_host, smtp_port, display_color, display_order, sync_enabled, last_sync_at, status, created_at FROM mail_accounts WHERE user_uuid = %(user_uuid)s AND status = 'active' ORDER BY display_order, created_at
accounts.insert_account: INSERT INTO mail_accounts (user_uuid, account_name, email, imap_host, imap_port, imap_use_ssl, imap_username, imap_password_encrypted, smtp_host, smtp_port, smtp_use_tls, smtp_username, smtp_password_encrypted, display_color) VALUES (%(user_uuid)s, %(account_name)s, %(email)s, %(imap_host)s, %(imap_port)s, %(imap_use_ssl)s, %(imap_username)s, %(imap_password_encrypted)s, %(smtp_host)s, %(smtp_port)s, %(smtp_use_tls)s, %(smtp_username)s, %(smtp_password_encrypted)s, %(display_color)s)
accounts.update_account: UPDATE mail_accounts SET account_name = COALESCE(%(account_name)s, account_name), imap_password_encrypted = COALESCE(%(imap_password_encrypted)s, imap_password_encrypted), smtp_password_encrypted = COALESCE(%(smtp_password_encrypted)s, smtp_password_encrypted), display_color = COALESCE(%(display_color)s, display_color), sync_enabled = COALESCE(%(sync_enabled)s, sync_enabled) WHERE account_uuid = %(account_uuid)s AND user_uuid = %(user_uuid)s
accounts.remove_account: UPDATE mail_accounts SET status = 'inactive' WHERE account_uuid = %(account_uuid)s

sync.insert_message: INSERT INTO mail_messages (message_uuid, account_uuid, folder_uuid, message_id, uid, from_email, from_name, to_emails, subject, preview, sent_date, has_attachments, body_file_path, size_bytes) VALUES (%(message_uuid)s, %(account_uuid)s, %(folder_uuid)s, %(message_id)s, %(uid)s, %(from_email)s, %(from_name)s, %(to_emails)s, %(subject)s, %(preview)s, %(sent_date)s, %(has_attachments)s, %(body_file_path)s, %(size_bytes)s)
sync.insert_sync_log: INSERT INTO sync_logs (account_uuid, sync_type, status, messages_fetched, messages_updated) VALUES (%(account_uuid)s, %(sync_type)s, %(status)s, %(messages_fetched)s, %(messages_updated)s)

inbox.get_attachment: SELECT attachment_uuid, filename, content_type, size_bytes, file_path FROM mail_attachments WHERE message_uuid = %s ORDER BY created_at
inbox.get_attachment_for_download: SELECT a.attachment_uuid, a.filename, a.content_type, a.size_bytes, a.file_path FROM mail_attachments a JOIN mail_messages m ON a.message_uuid = m.message_uuid JOIN mail_accounts ac ON m.account_uuid = ac.account_uuid WHERE a.attachment_uuid = %s AND a.message_uuid = %s AND ac.user_uuid = %s

gmail.get_accounts: SELECT account_uuid, account_name, email, picture, display_color, display_order, sync_enabled, last_sync_at, token_expires_at, status, created_at FROM mail_accounts WHERE user_uuid = %(user_uuid)s AND account_type = 'gmail' AND status = 'active' ORDER BY display_order, created_at
gmail.get_account: SELECT account_uuid, email, access_token_encrypted, refresh_token_encrypted, token_expires_at FROM mail_accounts WHERE account_uuid = %(account_uuid)s AND user_uuid = %(user_uuid)s AND account_type = 'gmail'
gmail.get_account_by_email: SELECT account_uuid, email, account_type FROM mail_accounts WHERE user_uuid = %(user_uuid)s AND email = %(email)s AND status = 'active'
gmail.update_account_by_email: UPDATE mail_accounts SET account_type = 'gmail' WHERE account_uuid = %(account_uuid)s
gmail.insert_account: INSERT INTO mail_accounts (user_uuid, account_type, account_name, email, access_token_encrypted, refresh_token_encrypted, token_expires_at, picture, display_color) VALUES (%(user_uuid)s, 'gmail', %(account_name)s, %(email)s, %(access_token_encrypted)s, %(refresh_token_encrypted)s, NOW() + INTERVAL %(token_expires_in)s SECOND, %(picture)s, '#EA4335')
gmail.update_tokens: UPDATE mail_accounts SET access_token_encrypted = %(access_token_encrypted)s, refresh_token_encrypted = COALESCE(%(refresh_token_encrypted)s, refresh_token_encrypted), token_expires_at = NOW() + INTERVAL %(token_expires_in)s SECOND, modified_at = NOW() WHERE account_uuid = %(account_uuid)s
gmail.update_access_token: UPDATE mail_accounts SET access_token_encrypted = %(access_token_encrypted)s, token_expires_at = NOW() + INTERVAL %(token_expires_in)s SECOND, modified_at = NOW() WHERE account_uuid = %(account_uuid)s
gmail.deactivate_account: UPDATE mail_accounts SET status = 'inactive', access_token_encrypted = NULL, refresh_token_encrypted = NULL, modified_at = NOW() WHERE account_uuid = %(account_uuid)s
gmail.check_token_expiry: SELECT account_uuid, email, access_token_encrypted, refresh_token_encrypted, token_expires_at, token_expires_at <= NOW() AS is_expired, token_expires_at <= NOW() + INTERVAL 5 MINUTE AS needs_refresh FROM mail_accounts WHERE account_uuid = %(account_uuid)s AND status = 'active'

idle.get_active_sync_accounts: SELECT account_uuid, user_uuid, account_type, sync_enabled FROM mail_accounts WHERE status = 'active'
